status: NEVER FLASHED TO HARDWARE — built and verified against DroidNet's flasher logic only. Bench-test before field use.
flash_via: DroidNet web UI -> Flash tab (upload file, connect board over USB).
board: FlthyHPs Holoprojectors (Ryan Sondgeroth) — Arduino Mega ADK, ATmega2560

droidnet_flash.note: Board auto-detected from MCU signature (0x1e9801 -> mega). Serial 9600 for the monitor; flashing uses the Mega/STK500v2 'wiring' programmer.
